title: ActionBar
description: ActionBar renders a horizontal toolbar with grouped action items. Each group can contain buttons, selects, or custom content. Supports responsive collapsing of items into a dropdown menu.

title: AsideHeader
description: AsideHeader is a collapsible sidebar navigation component. It renders a logo, menu items with icons and nested items, a panel toggle, and a footer section. Supports compact and expanded modes.

title: Footer
description: Footer renders a page footer with logo, navigation links organized in columns, social links, and copyright text. Supports light and dark color themes.

title: HotkeysPanel
description: HotkeysPanel renders a side panel listing available keyboard shortcuts grouped by category. Displays each shortcut with its key combination and description.

title: Logo
description: Logo renders a product or company logo with optional text label. Used as the header element in AsideHeader and MobileHeader navigation components.

title: MobileHeader
description: MobileHeader renders a mobile navigation header with a hamburger menu that opens a full-screen drawer. Supports logo, navigation items, and custom content areas.

title: Settings
description: Settings renders a settings panel with sections and individual setting items. Supports search filtering, custom renderers for setting values, and loading state.
